title: impl and Method
instruction: Define a struct Counter with count: u32 (start 0). Add an impl with increment(&mut self) that adds 1 and get(&self) that returns count. In main, create Counter::new(), call increment twice, and print get().

title: Associated Function
instruction: Add an associated function double_area that takes a side: u32 and returns side * side * 2. From main, print Counter::double_area(5). (Use a dummy struct or add to an existing one; or just a fn double_area in impl.)
